markdown.markdown:
[Hello, my name is Yuna Lee! I am a fifth grader at Summit Pointe Elementary School. ]{.fragment} [안녕하세요, 이유나 입니다. 저는 써밋 포인트 초등학교 5학년입니다.]{.fragment} ## What I Learned ::::{.columns} :::{.column width="50%" .fragment} Korean writing system is simple, because its writen the way it is pronunced! :::{.incremental} - First, you need a consonent. - Then, you need to add the vowel to the first consonent to complete the word you write. - If nesaeary, you have to add the final consonent below the first consonent and vowel combination. - The final consonent is also known as the Batchim (받침.) ::: ::: :::{.column width="50%" .fragment} :::{.no-gap} ![ [source: EasyTalkKorean (2023)](https://blog.naver.com/dotdot_n_connect/223229105280){style="margin-left:20px;font-size:.8em;"}
[**A mechanism to write Korean**]{style="margin-left:20px;"} ](./_assets/spe_biliteracy_hangul_explanation.png) ::: #### [Examples]{.fragment} ::::{.columns style="font-size:0.8em;" .fragment} :::{.column width="40%"} * 사람 - Person * 친구 - Friend * 학생- Student ::: :::{.column width="40%"} * 선생님- Teacher * 어머니- Mother * 아버지- Father ::: :::: ::: :::: ## My Motivations [The reason why I chose to study Korean is to communicate better with my parents and my grandparents when I talk to them during Facetime calls, also when I talk to my aunt and uncle. Although I know how to speak Korean, my knowledge is not fullproof.]{.fragment} [제가 한국어를 배우기로 결심한 이유는 부모님께서 한국 출신이시고 한국어를 사용하시며, 조부모님 또한 한국분이셔서 그분들 모두와 더 원활하게 소통하고 싶었기 때문입니다. 저는 한국어를 말할 수 있지만 읽기와 쓰기는 서툽니다.]{.fragment} ## In the Future * I would use this knowledge to talk and type to my family and friends. * I could use this knowledge at Korean Mass, during TV shows, reading, and Facetime calls with my grandparents, my aunt and my uncle. * I also could use this knowledge to help me learn other languages like Spanish or Japanese from my father who speaks Japanese fluently. ## New Language Learning is Important Learning a new language is important because it helps a single individual to understand other cultures and traditions. I think that people will open their hearts to learn about new and unfamiliar cultures by learning a new language to understand people worldwide who have a different traditions.

## Introduce Myself [Hello, my name is Yuna Lee! I am a fifth grader at Summit Pointe Elementary School. ]{.fragment} [안녕하세요, 이유나 입니다. 저는 써밋 포인트 초등학교 5학년입니다.]{.fragment} ## What I Learned ::::{.columns} :::{.column width="50%" .fragment} Korean writing system is simple, because its writen the way it is pronunced! :::{.incremental} - First, you need a consonent. - Then, you need to add the vowel to the first consonent to complete the word you write. - If nesaeary, you have to add the final consonent below the first consonent and vowel combination. - The final consonent is also known as the Batchim (받침.) ::: ::: :::{.column width="50%" .fragment} :::{.no-gap} ![ [source: EasyTalkKorean (2023)](https://blog.naver.com/dotdot_n_connect/223229105280){style="margin-left:20px;font-size:.8em;"}
[**A mechanism to write Korean**]{style="margin-left:20px;"} ](./_assets/spe_biliteracy_hangul_explanation.png) ::: #### [Examples]{.fragment} ::::{.columns style="font-size:0.8em;" .fragment} :::{.column width="40%"} * 사람 - Person * 친구 - Friend * 학생- Student ::: :::{.column width="40%"} * 선생님- Teacher * 어머니- Mother * 아버지- Father ::: :::: ::: :::: ## My Motivations [The reason why I chose to study Korean is to communicate better with my parents and my grandparents when I talk to them during Facetime calls, also when I talk to my aunt and uncle. Although I know how to speak Korean, my knowledge is not fullproof.]{.fragment} [제가 한국어를 배우기로 결심한 이유는 부모님께서 한국 출신이시고 한국어를 사용하시며, 조부모님 또한 한국분이셔서 그분들 모두와 더 원활하게 소통하고 싶었기 때문입니다. 저는 한국어를 말할 수 있지만 읽기와 쓰기는 서툽니다.]{.fragment} ## In the Future * I would use this knowledge to talk and type to my family and friends. * I could use this knowledge at Korean Mass, during TV shows, reading, and Facetime calls with my grandparents, my aunt and my uncle. * I also could use this knowledge to help me learn other languages like Spanish or Japanese from my father who speaks Japanese fluently. ## New Language Learning is Important Learning a new language is important because it helps a single individual to understand other cultures and traditions. I think that people will open their hearts to learn about new and unfamiliar cultures by learning a new language to understand people worldwide who have a different traditions.

include-in-header.text:
<style>
@font-face {
  font-family: "Deogonn-Preincess-Classic";
  src: url('./_assets/DeogonPrincessClassic.ttf') format('truetype');
}
.reveal .slide-background-content {
  background-image: url('./_assets/spi_biliteracy_background.png');
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
}
.reveal .slide-background:first-child .slide-background-content {
  background-image: none;
}
#hangul-chart {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 65%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 100%;
  opacity: 0;
  z-index: 10;
}
</style>
<script>
window.addEventListener('load', function() {

  setTimeout(function() {

    // Create Hangul chart image (hidden)
    var hangulImg = document.createElement('img');
    hangulImg.id = 'hangul-chart';
    hangulImg.src = './_assets/spe_biliteracy_hangul_00.png';
    document.querySelector('#title-slide').appendChild(hangulImg);

    var footer = document.querySelector('.reveal .footer');
    var progress = document.querySelector('.reveal .progress');
    var slideNumber = document.querySelector('.reveal .slide-number');
    var menuButton = document.querySelector('.reveal .slide-menu-button');

    function showUI() {
      if (footer) footer.style.cssText = 'display:block !important';
      if (progress) progress.style.cssText = 'display:block !important';
      if (slideNumber) slideNumber.style.cssText = 'display:block !important';
      if (menuButton) menuButton.style.cssText = 'display:block !important';
    }

    function hideUI() {
      if (footer) footer.style.cssText = 'display:none !important';
      if (progress) progress.style.cssText = 'display:none !important';
      if (slideNumber) slideNumber.style.cssText = 'display:none !important';
      // if (menuButton) menuButton.style.cssText = 'display:none !important';
    }

    // Check current slide
    var indices = Reveal.getIndices();
    if (indices.h === 0 && indices.v === 0) {
      hideUI();
    } else {
      showUI();
    }

    Reveal.on('slidechanged', function(e) {
      if (e.indexh === 0 && e.indexv === 0) {
        hideUI();
      } else {
        showUI();
      }
    });
  
    // Title slide animation: 3 steps
    // Fade out title content on first click/keypress
    var titleStep = 0;
    
    document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
      var indices = Reveal.getIndices();
      if (indices.h === 0 && indices.v === 0) {
        if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'ArrowDown' || e.key === ' ') {
    
          if (titleStep === 0) {
            // Step 1: Fade out title text
            e.preventDefault();
            e.stopImmediatePropagation();
            titleStep = 1;
            var els = document.querySelectorAll('.quarto-title-block h1.title, .quarto-title-block p.subtitle, .quarto-title-block .quarto-title-authors');
            els.forEach(function(el) {
              el.style.transition = 'opacity 1.5s ease-in';
              el.style.opacity = '0';
            });
    
          } else if (titleStep === 1) {
            // Step 2: Show Hangul chart
            e.preventDefault();
            e.stopImmediatePropagation();
            titleStep = 2;
            var img = document.getElementById('hangul-chart');
            if (img) {
              img.style.transition = 'opacity 1s ease-in';
              img.style.opacity = '1';
            }
    
          }
          // Step 3: titleStep === 2, don't prevent — let RevealJS advance
        }
      }
    }, true);
    
    // Reset when returning to title slide
    Reveal.on('slidechanged', function(e) {
      if (e.indexh === 0 && e.indexv === 0) {
        titleStep = 0;
        var els = document.querySelectorAll('.quarto-title-block h1.title, .quarto-title-block p.subtitle, .quarto-title-block .quarto-title-authors');
        els.forEach(function(el) {
          el.style.transition = 'none';
          el.style.opacity = '1';
        });
        var img = document.getElementById('hangul-chart');
        if (img) {
          img.style.transition = 'none';
          img.style.opacity = '0';
        }
      }
    });
  }, 100);
});
</script>

language.appendix-attribution-cite-as: For attribution, please cite this work as:
